title: koeleria filifolia
intro: Koeleria filifolia, also known as the tufted hair-grass, is a species of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, Koeleria filifolia has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to have various health benefits. The plant has been used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. Koeleria filifolia can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal remedies.
